Install.title: Add Portfolio to your home screen
Install.iosHint: To install: tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”.

Offline.title: You’re offline
Offline.body: Check your connection and try again. Pages you’ve already opened stay available; live prices and data resume once you’re back online.

Landing.title: Portfolio Tracker
Landing.tagline: Track Indonesian stocks, gold, bonds, mutual funds and cash — import transactions straight from a screenshot.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.subtitle: Server configuration. Visible to admins only.
Admin.providersHint: Enable or disable market-data providers and set the order they're tried in (top first). API keys are configured via environment variables.
Admin.updateError: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.
Admin.unavailable: Provider settings are unavailable right now.

Income.title: Income
Income.subtitle: Dividends and bond coupons across your portfolios.
Income.emptyBody: Dividends and coupons appear here once you record them as transactions.

Savings.title: Savings
Savings.subtitle: How much you put in over time, and where it's headed.
Savings.forecastSubtitle: Project the value if you keep saving at an assumed annual return.
Savings.emptyBody: Record deposits or savings-plan purchases and your saving progress appears here.

Portfolios.title: Portfolios
Portfolios.subtitle: Create and manage your portfolios.
Portfolios.empty: No portfolios yet — create your first one.

PortfolioForm.subtitle: Give it a name and a base currency to value it in.
PortfolioForm.name: Portfolio name
PortfolioForm.birthYearHint: Used for the “to age 18” savings forecast.
PortfolioForm.error: Couldn't save the portfolio. Please try again.
PortfolioForm.deleteWarning: This permanently deletes the portfolio and all its transactions.
PortfolioForm.trConnectAfterSave: Save the portfolio first to set up the Trade Republic connection.

Import.title: Import transactions
Import.subtitle: Upload a screenshot or CSV — review the draft, then confirm.

dropzone.title: Add a transaction
dropzone.hint: From a broker, gold app or bank confirmation

Import.reviewHint: Check the details before confirming — nothing is saved until you do.

contract.title: Gold installment contract
contract.subtitle: Financed gold purchase (Pegadaian / Galeri 24). Confirm the details before saving.
contract.gramsHint: From the purchase receipt (Bukti Pembelian Emas)

issues.attention: {count, plural, one {# event needs attention} other {# events need attention}}
issues.ignored: {count, plural, one {# ignored event} other {# ignored events}}
issues.mapTitle: Map this event to a transaction

done.title: Imported
done.hint: {count, plural, one {# transaction added} other {# transactions added}} to your portfolio.

errors.notConfigured: No vision parser is configured yet. Add an API key to enable screenshot import.
errors.parseFailed: Couldn't read that screenshot. Try a clearer image or enter it manually.
errors.fileRead: Couldn't read that file. Please try again.
errors.noDrafts: No transactions were found in that file.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ImportHistory.title: Recent imports
ImportHistory.reviewSubtitle: Check the transactions, then confirm to add them — or discard the import.
ImportHistory.reviewError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ImportHistory.undoWarning: Removes {count, plural, one {# transaction} other {# transactions}}.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Your net worth across every portfolio.

Empty.unavailableBody: Sign in and make sure the API server is running, then refresh.
Empty.noPortfolioBody: Create a portfolio and add transactions to start tracking your holdings.
Empty.noHoldingsBody: Add a buy transaction — by screenshot, CSV or manually — to see positions here.
Empty.noTransactionsBody: Import a screenshot or CSV, or add a transaction manually, to get started.
Empty.historyBody: Performance history appears once daily prices are collected.
Empty.noMoversBody: Day changes appear once live prices refresh for your holdings.

Instrument.noHistory: No price history yet — it appears with a configured market-data source.
Instrument.notFoundBody: It may have been removed, or the API is unavailable.

CorpAction.title: Record a corporate action
CorpAction.subtitle: Apply a split, bonus or rights issue to an instrument.
CorpAction.ratioHint: e.g. 2 for a 2:1 split, 0.1 for a 1:10 bonus
CorpAction.needInstrument: Search for and select an instrument first.
CorpAction.error: Couldn't record the action. Check the fields and try again.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Your account and preferences.
Settings.name: Name
Settings.displayCurrencyHint: Net worth and totals are shown in this currency.
Settings.updateError: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.

Transactions.title: Transactions
Transactions.subtitle: Every buy, sell, dividend and cash flow.

portfolio.title: Create a portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Give it a name and a base currency to value it in.
portfolio.name: Portfolio name
portfolio.error: Couldn't create the portfolio. Please try again.
portfolio.needFirst: Create a portfolio first to start adding transactions.

tx.title: Add a transaction
tx.subtitle: Record a trade, dividend or cash movement.
tx.search: Search by symbol, name, or ISIN
tx.noResults: No matches — add it as a new instrument below.
tx.discoveredResults: From market data — tap to auto-fill
tx.name: Name
tx.error: Couldn't save the transaction. Check the fields and try again.
tx.symbolRequired: Enter a symbol, or pick a match above.
tx.goldLabelPlaceholder: e.g. Antam 5g bar, Pegadaian Tabungan Emas
tx.goldNote: Valued by the gram at the chosen source's buyback price.

TradeRepublic.title: Trade Republic
TradeRepublic.subtitle: Connect your Trade Republic account to import your transactions.
TradeRepublic.wafTokenHint: Paste this from your browser only if automatic connection fails.
TradeRepublic.approveTitle: Approve the login in your app
TradeRepublic.approveHint: Open Trade Republic on your phone and approve the login request. If you don't see it, fully close and reopen the app.
TradeRepublic.approvalError: The login wasn't approved in time. Please try again.
TradeRepublic.connectedHint: Your account is connected. Sync pulls new activity as draft transactions you confirm.
TradeRepublic.synced: Synced — {drafts} draft transactions staged. Review them on the Import page.

categories.title: What to import
categories.hint: Trade Republic is a full bank account. Choose which activity to stage as drafts.

reimport.warning: This deletes all Trade Republic transactions in this portfolio and re-stages the full timeline to confirm again. Manual edits to those rows are lost.

TradeRepublic.expiredHint: Your session expired. Reconnect to resume syncing.
TradeRepublic.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
TradeRepublic.boundElsewhere: This Trade Republic account is connected to another portfolio. Connecting here will move it to this portfolio.

errors.pytr_not_available: Trade Republic sync isn't set up on the server.
errors.encryption_required: The server can't store credentials securely yet (encryption key missing).
errors.tr_pairing_failed: Couldn't start the Trade Republic login. Please try again.
errors.portfolio_not_found: That portfolio could no longer be found.
errors.not_connected: Not connected. Reconnect and try again.
